title: Automated PM overlay (pm.json)
description: Overlay, not mirror. pm.json stores only what Forgejo cannot express (priority ordering, plan/phase grouping, the gate DAG, pending decisions) and references issues by owner/repo#num STRINGS. It never caches issue facts (title/body/state/status/assignee) - Forgejo stays authoritative and the renderer joins the two. Purity is enforced structurally: issue refs are strings, every object sets additionalProperties:false, and no issue-fact field is defined on any issue-referencing object.

updated.description: When the overlay was last regenerated (RFC3339). Overlay-authored, not a forge fact.

policy.description: Repo-relative path to the triage policy the groom applies (produced by Stage 0).

repos.description: The explicit managed repo list. The groom reads only these; never org enumeration.

plans.description: Multi-step plans, each a set of phases with gates.

priority.description: ORDERED priority list - array position is the rank. tier is a coarse bucket, note is optional rationale.

gates.description: The gate DAG: issue X is blocked by issues Y.

decisions_pending.description: Open questions awaiting a human decision.

issueRef.description: A forge issue reference, owner/repo#num. A plain string - there is no per-issue object to hang cached facts on.

plan.description: A plan. title/status/goal here are overlay-authored plan facts, NOT cached forge-issue facts, so they are legitimate.

phase.description: A plan phase. Issue-referencing: no issue-fact fields allowed.

priorityEntry.description: One ranked issue. Issue-referencing: only overlay-authored tier/note beside the ref - no cached issue facts.

gate.description: One gate edge: blocked is blocked BY the refs in by. Issue-referencing: no issue-fact fields.

decision.description: One pending decision. May reference the issue it concerns. Issue-referencing: no issue-fact fields.
